quotes.verbatim_quote:
Below are the six basic fingerings for the major scales. This will give you an idea how the rule works
           on any sclae or scale type passage..
quotes.why_load_bearing: States the chapter's thesis that the picking rule from earlier chapters applies uniformly across all six major-scale fingerings.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
For more info on these fingerings see my book "Six Essential Fingerings for the Jazz Guitarist"
          at www.jimmybruno.com
quotes.why_load_bearing: Anchors this chapter to Bruno's broader six-fingering system, which is the scale framework the picking rule is being applied to.
Defines the notation that marks where Bruno's picking rule for crossing to a higher string applies in every exercise in the chapter.
Defines the companion symbol that marks lower-string crossings, the second case the picking rule must handle.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Picking applied to Major scale fingering 6V2
quotes.why_load_bearing: Names exercise 12 as the 6V2 fingering, establishing the V2 (root on 6th string, two-notes-per-string variant) labeling convention used throughout.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Picking applied to Major scale fingering 5V2
quotes.why_load_bearing: Labels exercise 13 as the 5th-string-root V2 fingering, the second of the six core shapes.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Picking applied to Major scale fingering 6V4
quotes.why_load_bearing: Labels exercise 14 as the 6V4 fingering, introducing the V4 variant family of major-scale shapes.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Picking applied to Major scale fingering 5V4
quotes.why_load_bearing: Labels the 5th-string-root V4 fingering, completing the V-series pair.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Picking applied to Major scale fingering 6H2
quotes.why_load_bearing: Introduces the H2 (horizontal/position-shift) family of fingerings rooted on the 6th string.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Picking applied to Major scale fingering 5H2
quotes.why_load_bearing: Labels the final 5th-string-root H2 fingering, closing the set of six essential major-scale shapes Bruno applies the picking rule to.
